name: zach
method: arrival-time regression (scatter-deconvolved EMG sub-band t0 vs nu^-2; coherent_dedisp at DSA DM; uniform TDS=32/N_SB=6); downsampling rescues faint bursts. See .agents/audit-chime-side-dm.md
dm_status: independent CHIME DM (4 sub-bands @ S/N>=4); consistent with DSA within the 1 pc/cm^3 agreement floor. Statistical sigma is a lower bound for the 3-4 sub-band fits.

name: whitney
method: arrival-time regression (scatter-deconvolved EMG sub-band t0 vs nu^-2; coherent_dedisp at DSA DM; uniform TDS=32/N_SB=6); downsampling rescues faint bursts. See .agents/audit-chime-side-dm.md
dm_status: does not constrain DM: only 0 sub-bands above S/N 4 at the coarsest binning that the bright control still resolves; scatter/S-N-limited. Lean on Pillar 4 (position).

dm_status: does not constrain DM: only 1 sub-bands above S/N 4 at the coarsest binning that the bright control still resolves; scatter/S-N-limited. Lean on Pillar 4 (position).
